error.cannot_connect: Could not authenticate to the direct-Bluetooth collector.

user.description: Connect to the standalone collector that has the physical Bluetooth adapter. Home Assistant Bluetooth and ESPHome proxies are not used.
user.title: Quantum Fiber C5500XK

init.description: The collector must also allow writes. Buttons remain disabled entities until enabled individually; enabling this option does not execute a command.
